title: So All we need is Love Anthem For World Peace Lyrics - Simbu(STR)
stanzas:
Album Name : So We Need Is - STR
Singer : Simbu
Music Director : Simbu

Oh Dashuri dashuri
dashuri dashuri Salang Salang
Leifde Leifde Las'ka Las'ka  (2)

Armastus Armastus Rakkaus Rakkaus 
Ag'api Ag'api Lyubov Lyubov

All we need is love..aai..amour..amour
All we need is love..aai..amour..amour

All we need is love..aai..amour..amour
All we need is love..aai..amour..amour.. amour

Love is full of energy
Love is positivity

We don't need negativity
Love to feel humanity

Lets not cry and lets not try
hating, hurting and killing each other

We wont get another life together
oh my brother

so all we need is pyaar..prema..kaadhal
oh all we need is pyaar..prema..kaadhal..kaadhal

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a powerful message about the importance of love and peace in the world.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In the movie Love Anthem For World Peace, the song serves as a celebration of unity and harmony among people.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by Simbu.

When was the song released?

The song was released on December 29, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song So All we need is Love Anthem For World Peace encapsulates a vibrant message of love and unity. It serves as a celebration of peace, encouraging listeners to embrace love in their lives. The upbeat tempo and motivational lyrics evoke feelings of joy and togetherness, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. In the context of the movie, it highlights the importance of harmony among people, resonating with the film's core theme.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: So All we need is Love Anthem For World Peace is a vibrant and uplifting track that resonates with the spirit of unity and love. Simbu's unique musical style shines through in this anthem, making it a perfect addition to any celebration. Experience the joy and positivity that this song brings, as it encourages listeners to embrace love and peace.
